raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 802 proposes the establishment of the Sacramento Area Housing and Homelessness Agency to address housing and homelessness challenges in Sacramento County.",
    "SB 802 aims to dismantle the fragmented system currently impeding regional advancement on homelessness and affordable housing.",
    "The new Joint Powers Authority (JPA) will be governed by elected representatives from various jurisdictions in Sacramento County.",
    "SB 802 creates a first-in-the-state model for a single entity to lead the provision of homelessness and housing services regionally.",
    "The Sacramento Area Housing and Homelessness Agency will have the legal authority to apply for and administer state and federal housing funds.",
    "The report from the Sacramento Grand Jury outlined significant coordination challenges due to the diversity and number of organizations involved in homelessness services.",
    "The current competitive approach among agencies for funding has failed to produce meaningful progress in addressing homelessness in Sacramento.",
    "In the last five years, the State of California has provided over $400 million to address homelessness in Sacramento."
  ]
}
```
